message:
feat(vdbe,fts5): add FTS5 rebuild command, rank column evaluation, and vtab insert guard

Four changes to the FrankenSQLite core VDBE and FTS5 subsystems:

1. Remove JIT insert optimization: strip jit_insert_template and
   jit_execution_count fields from PreparedStatement, removing the V3.2
   "bd-perf" JIT fast-path that bypassed the VDBE interpreter for simple
   sequential INSERTs. This codepath was unreliable with virtual tables
   and added complexity without measurable benefit in the current workload.

2. Expand FTS5 maintenance commands: replace is_fts5_optimize_noop_insert()
   (bool, optimize-only) with fts5_maintenance_insert_command() returning
   Option<Fts5MaintenanceCommand> enum with Optimize and Rebuild variants.
   execute_fts5_maintenance_insert() handles both: Optimize remains a no-op,
   Rebuild deletes and re-inserts all documents in the FTS5 index. This
   enables callers to trigger full FTS rebuild via the standard
   INSERT INTO fts(fts) VALUES('rebuild') SQL pattern.

3. Add FTS5 rank column evaluation: try_eval_fts5_rank_column() computes
   BM25 scores when a query references the rank pseudo-column on an FTS5
   table. Fts5AuxTableContext gains a column_count field for BM25 weight
   vectors. eval_join_expr falls back to this function when a column
   reference isn't found in the normal column map.

4. Add virtual table guard for prepared INSERT: can_use_prepared_insert_
   fast_path now returns false when the target table has a live virtual
   table instance (has_live_vtab_instance), ensuring contentless FTS5
   tables route through the live vtab runtime instead of the direct B-tree
   path.

New tests:
- test_fts5_contentless_prepared_insert_with_params_uses_live_vtab_runtime
- test_update_after_alter_add_column_preserves_trailing_nullable_fields_
  on_ipk_tables
- test_update_after_alter_add_column_preserves_single_nullable_payload_
  field_on_ipk_tables

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
